message.content:
1. Yes, the hero section is visible at the top. The last visible element of the hero is large red text ("ON 10K • LOGRA").  
2. No, there is no section heading introducing the products.  
3. Yes, there is a noticeable blank white gap between the hero and the first product card. It is roughly 3/4 of the total height of the image.  
4. No product card is visible at the bottom.  
5. No rendering issues are present (no cut-off text, broken images, overlapping elements, or unstyled HTML).
